default_creds.context: Web UI + API admin login. Set by DEFAULT_ROOT_PSW='1234' in the default docker-compose; force-reset to this value on EVERY container restart unless the env var is changed. Login at http://HOST:3000.
MongoDB root (MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME/PASSWORD) — internal 'data' network by default, not port-mapped, but reachable via SSRF (CVE-2026-34162).
MinIO object store (MINIO_ROOT_USER/PASSWORD). Ports 9000 (S3) and 9001 (console) ARE host-mapped by default in docker-compose.pg.yml.
Highest-privilege system API key (ROOT_KEY env, anchor x-system-key='fastgpt-xxx'). Hardcoded default in the shipped compose.

install_tell: bash <(curl -fsSL https://doc.fastgpt.cn/deploy/install.sh)   # interactive: picks vector DB, then `docker compose up -d`. Manual path: download docker-compose.pg.yml (pgvector default) + config.json, then `docker compose up -d`. Access http://localhost:3000, login root/1234.
misconfig_patterns: Operator runs quickstart and exposes :3000 without changing DEFAULT_ROOT_PSW -> root/1234 works internet-wide
Shared secrets left at shipped defaults (TOKEN_KEY=fastgpt, AES256_SECRET_KEY=fastgptsecret, FILE_TOKEN_KEY=filetokenkey, ROOT_KEY=fastgpt-xxx) -> forgeable session/file tokens and predictable crypto
MinIO 9000/9001 host-mapped with minioadmin/minioadmin -> direct object-store access independent of app auth
Running a pre-4.14.9.5 image -> /api/support/user/account/loginByPassword NoSQL injection ({"password":{"$ne":""}}) yields unauth admin without even needing the default password
Pre-4.14.10.4 -> cross-team app execution via foreign appId on /api/v1/chat/completions

passive: http.favicon.hash for projects/app/public/favicon.ico (15086-byte vendor icon at /favicon.ico) — compute mmh3 from the live deploy; FastGPT ships a single unique favicon across the fleet
http.html:"/api/common/system/getInitData" (the SPA bootstraps by calling this exact path; the string appears in the served JS/HTML)
http.title:"FastGPT" (weaker — operator-customizable; pair with another signal, see false_positive_check)

response_markers: JSON response object containing a top-level "feConfigs" key (FastGPT-unique front-end config blob)
"systemVersion" string of form vX.Y.Z (e.g. v4.15.0) when token present; on unauth path feConfigs+modelProviders return without a token (catch-block fallback)
bufferId field prefixed "unAuth_" on the no-token response path
active_probe.false_positive_check: Do NOT fingerprint on generic strings ("FastGPT" title is operator-customizable via feConfigs/systemDescription, and "chat"/"AI"/"knowledge base" collide with thousands of unrelated hosts). Confirm with TWO independent vendor-unique signals: (1) GET /api/common/system/getInitData returns JSON with the exact key name `feConfigs` (this object name is FastGPT-specific, not Dify/Flowise which use /console/api/setup and /api/v1/* respectively); AND (2) the login route /api/support/user/account/loginByPassword exists (404 elsewhere). Dify exposes /console/api/* and a `/console/api/setup` init flag; Flowise exposes /api/v1/ping and Bull-style routes; FastGPT's getInitData feConfigs shape + the /api/support/user/account/* tree disambiguate. Reverse-proxy / wildcard catch-all hosts that 200 every path are excluded by requiring the literal `feConfigs` JSON key in the body, not just an HTTP 200.

deployment_tells: Default port 3000 (fastgpt-app), 3003/3005 (fastgpt-mcp-server), 9000+9001 (MinIO S3 + console, host-mapped by default)

Docker images pulled from registry.cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/fastgpt/* (Alibaba Cloud Hangzhou registry) — strong China-self-host tell; container names fastgpt-app / fastgpt-mongo / fastgpt-pg / fastgpt-redis / fastgpt-minio / fastgpt-aiproxy
Bundled stack: MongoDB replica-set rs0 + pgvector (or Milvus/Zilliz/OceanBase/SeekDB/opengauss variants) + Redis + MinIO + aiproxy + code-sandbox + plugin service
Co-located MinIO console on :9001 with minioadmin/minioadmin; aiproxy on internal net with ADMIN_KEY 'token'
Chinese-language UI/docs default (doc.fastgpt.cn); README and compose comments in Simplified Chinese
pivot_paths: GET /api/common/system/getInitData (no token) -> read feConfigs + modelProviders + aiproxyChannels to confirm platform, version, and which LLM providers are wired without authenticating
/favicon.ico -> mmh3 favicon hash -> pivot the rest of the FastGPT fleet on Shodan/Censys
If unmodified: login root/1234 at /api/support/user/account/loginByPassword -> full admin (read-only stops here; do not exercise on third-party hosts)
MinIO console :9001 with minioadmin/minioadmin -> enumerate fastgpt-public / fastgpt-private buckets (object listing only)
Version string from getInitData/systemVersion -> map to CVE applicability (pre-4.14.9.5 = unauth NoSQL login bypass; pre-4.14.10.4 = cross-team IDOR)
vulnerabilities: CVE-2026-40351 (GHSA-x8mx-2mr7-h9xg), CVSS 9.8: unauth NoSQL injection in POST /api/support/user/account/loginByPassword — MongoUser.findOne({username,password}) with no runtime type check; {"password":{"$ne":""}} logs in as any user incl. root. Affected <=4.14.8.3, fixed 4.14.9.5 (Zod LoginByPasswordBodySchema added).

CVE-2026-34162 (GHSA-w36r-f268-pwrj), CVSS 9.8: UNAUTH SSRF — /api/core/app/httpTools/runTool acts as an open HTTP proxy (user-supplied URL+headers), exfiltrates configured provider API keys and reaches internal Mongo/Redis/PG/MinIO. Affected <=4.14.8.3, fixed 4.14.9.5.

CVE-2026-40352 (GHSA-422w-vrfj-72g6), CVSS 8.8: authenticated NoSQL injection in password-change (updatePasswordByOld.ts) — inject Mongo operators into oldPsw to reset password without the old one -> account takeover. Affected <=4.14.8.3, fixed 4.14.9.5.

CVE-2026-40252 (GHSA-gc8m-w37w-24hw), CVSS 5.3: IDOR/BOLA — authenticated team executes other teams' apps via foreign appId on /api/v1|v2/chat/completions and /api/core/chat/team/init (missing app.teamId===teamId check); leaks cross-tenant system prompts/workflows. Affected <=4.14.10.3, fixed 4.14.10.4.
GHSA-xpx6-xcpf-76qg: unauth SSRF in the Laf Workflow Node (missing internal-address validation).
auth_evidence: PRIMARY SOURCE: document/public/deploy/docker/main/cn/docker-compose.pg.yml (the pgvector compose the quickstart install.sh pulls). The fastgpt-app service sets `DEFAULT_ROOT_PSW: *x-default-root-psw` where the anchor is `x-default-root-psw: &x-default-root-psw '1234'`, username `root`. The inline comment states root password "重启后会强制重置该密码成环境变量值" (force-reset to the env value on every container restart), so the login is gated but the credential is a universal, predictable default (root/1234). The file header literally warns "建议修改账密后再运行" (recommended to change the credentials before running), confirming it ships insecure-by-default. Posture is auth-on-default (there IS a login wall) but the effective security is near-open because the seeded credential is identical across every unmodified deploy. Additional hardcoded shared secrets in the same default file: `TOKEN_KEY: fastgpt`, `FILE_TOKEN_KEY: filetokenkey`, `AES256_SECRET_KEY: fastgptsecret`, `ROOT_KEY: 'fastgpt-xxx'`, plus DB creds myusername/mypassword (mongo+redis) and minioadmin/minioadmin (object store). Caveat lowering this below the pure auth-on-default ideal: the unauth endpoint /api/common/system/getInitData returns feConfigs+modelProviders to callers with no token (catch-block fallback in projects/app/src/pages/api/common/system/getInitData.ts), so a slice of the API answers pre-login (ui-gated-api-open behavior on that route).
sensitive_assets: Upstream LLM provider API keys (OpenAI/DeepSeek/Anthropic/etc.) stored in aiproxy + model config — exfiltrable via CVE-2026-34162 unauth SSRF proxy or via root/1234 admin login
Ingested RAG knowledge-base documents and dataset collections (the customer's private corpus, frequently PII/proprietary)
Vector store contents (pgvector/Milvus embeddings of ingested docs)
Visual workflow / agent (flow) definitions = business logic, system prompts, tool wiring (cross-team readable via CVE-2026-40252 IDOR)
Conversation / chat history per app and team
System prompts and app configurations of other tenants (cross-team via BOLA)
Internal infra creds: MongoDB myusername/mypassword, Redis mypassword, MinIO minioadmin/minioadmin, aiproxy ADMIN_KEY — reachable from the SSRF proxy
sources: [CANDIDATE - NuClide Cat-34 rag-app-builders Stage -1 OSINT 2026-06-12; software-default characterization, no live host probed yet]
